creator: 2igosha@gmail.com
text:
The latest (just csup'ped) graphics/djvulibre port fails "make install":

. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS  -I/usr/local/include    -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c ./qd_mime_dialog.cpp
moc ./qd_mime_dialog.h -o qd_mime_dialog_moc.cpp
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I../.. -I../../libdjvu -I./  -I../../gui/indep/QT/  -I../../gui/indep/QX/  -I../../gui/indep/utils/  -I../../gui/shared/QT/  -I../../gui/shared/res/  -I../../gui/shared/utils/ -I. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS  -I/usr/local/include    -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c qd_mime_dialog_moc.cpp
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I../.. -I../../libdjvu -I./  -I../../gui/indep/QT/  -I../../gui/indep/QX/  -I../../gui/indep/utils/  -I../../gui/shared/QT/  -I../../gui/shared/res/  -I../../gui/shared/utils/ -I. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS  -I/usr/local/include    -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c ./qd_about_dialog.cpp
moc ./qd_about_dialog.h -o qd_about_dialog_moc.cpp
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I../.. -I../../libdjvu -I./  -I../../gui/indep/QT/  -I../../gui/indep/QX/  -I../../gui/indep/utils/  -I../../gui/shared/QT/  -I../../gui/shared/res/  -I../../gui/shared/utils/ -I. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS  -I/usr/local/include    -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c qd_about_dialog_moc.cpp
moc ./main.cpp -o main_moc.inc
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I../.. -I../../libdjvu -I./  -I../../gui/indep/QT/  -I../../gui/indep/QX/  -I../../gui/indep/utils/  -I../../gui/shared/QT/  -I../../gui/shared/res/  -I../../gui/shared/utils/ -I. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS  -I/usr/local/include    -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -c ./main.cpp
./../gui/bin2cpp/bin2cpp ppm_djvu_logo < ../../gui/shared/cin_data/ppm_djvu_logo.cin > ppm_djvu_logo.cpp
